stories.title: Database Migration: List-Scoped Stores
stories.notes: Migration adds list_id FK to stores and creates user_store_defaults table. DROP POLICY order fixed to precede DROP COLUMN.

stories.title: Service Layer: List-Scoped Store CRUD + User Store Defaults
stories.notes: database.js updated for list-scoped CRUD. saveUserStoreDefaultOrder filters temp IDs. duplicateList nulls store_id on duplicated items.

stories.title: New List Creation Copies User Store Defaults
stories.notes: New list creation seeds stores from user_store_defaults for the matching list type.

stories.title: State Management: List-Scoped Stores in ShoppingListContext
stories.notes: Stores scoped to activeListId. createUserStoreDefaultAction appends full object. saveUserStoreDefaultOrderAction merges by listType.

stories.title: Store Management UI: List-Scoped (React Web)
stories.notes: StoreManager listId prop removed. ListSelector and MobileListDetail updated. isOwned gate fixes applied for prd-collaborator-edit-access compatibility.

stories.title: List Defaults Settings UI: Stores Per List Type (React Web)
stories.notes: UserStoreDefaultsManager component with separate onCreateDefault, onUpdateDefault, onDeleteDefault, onReorderDefaults callbacks. MobileSettings wired to context actions.

stories.title: iOS: List-Scoped Store Management (Swift)
stories.notes: StoreService and ListDetailViewModel updated for list-scoped stores. UserStoreDefaultService and DefaultStoreEditorView added. Stores tab removed from MainTabView.

stories.title: Enable Store Assignment for Packing and Project List Types (React Web + iOS)
stories.notes: listTypes.js and ListTypeConfig.swift updated — packing and project types now have fields.store: true and store in sortLevels/defaultSort.
